query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of an urban street captured from the center of the roadway, with tram tracks running toward the horizon. A large red truck is parked at the curb on the left, while buildings with illuminated signs and awnings line the right side. Multiple street lamps create bright points of light along both sides of the street, receding into the distance where vehicle taillights are visible. Additional vehicles and structures are silhouetted along the edges of the road.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime street photograph captured with heavy motion blur streaking horizontally across the entire frame, softening the road, vehicles, and buildings into dynamic smears. Tram tracks run down the center of an urban road flanked by a large red truck at the left curb and shopfronts with glowing signs on the right, all bathed in a sickly sodium-vapor orange-yellow color cast from the street lamps. The camera movement during exposure dissolves architectural details into streaks of light and shadow while the unnatural tint permeates the darkened street.
